risk: CRITICAL: the I2C RGB controller owns reset and IRQ GPIOs, firmware flashing, LED class callbacks, sysfs controls and a watchdog recovery path.
dependencies: Android GKI 6.12.23 I2C, LED, GPIO, pinctrl, firmware and hrtimer APIs
Device Tree reset-gpio, irq-gpio and aw22xxx LED child properties
rollback: Do not unbind or unload the stock LED driver automatically. Hardware validation requires a RAM-booted kernel, continuous dmesg capture, saved stock binding data and immediate reboot rollback.
stop_conditions: I2C timeout or repeated reset loop
